data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding financial penalties.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the financial penalty for cancellations within 48 hours. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the enforcement of this penalty. The linked use case mentions the penalty but lacks concrete evidence of the system's ability to enforce this requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation tracking or penalty enforcement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
